tasks.subject: Task 1: inlineRadio node module + group-toggle NodeView
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the `inlineRadio` ProseMirror Node with input rule, paste transform plugin, and a NodeView whose click handler implements the same-textblock radio-group toggle (selected→none allowed).

**Files:**
- Create: `app/src/lib/editor/inlineRadio/index.ts`
- Create: `app/src/lib/editor/inlineRadio/node.ts`
- Create: `app/tests/unit/editor/inlineRadio/node.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- inlineRadio/node.test.ts` → all tests pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/inlineRadio/index.ts", "app/src/lib/editor/inlineRadio/node.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/inlineRadio/node.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- inlineRadio/node.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["inlineRadio schema atomic/inline/marks:''/selected default false", "( ) (o) (O) input rule converts in body", "title-line input rule blocked", "paste transform splits ( )/(o), recurses, blocks title destination", "click unselected radio selects it + clears siblings in same textblock", "click selected radio toggles off (none selected allowed)", "list-item bodies are independent groups vs nested li", "inlineCheckbox in same textblock unaffected", "single tr per click (undo one step)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Archiver round-trip for inlineRadio
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `( )` / `(o)` text ↔ `inlineRadio` node conversion to `noteContentArchiver.ts` parse + serialize paths, mirroring the existing `inlineCheckbox` handling at 5 sites: split helper, parse-split call (3-pass chain), serialize emit (paragraph loop + bulletList loop), `nextTextNodeMarks` early-return, `getPlainText` branch.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/src/lib/core/noteContentArchiver.ts` (lines 96, 205, 280–284, 422–436, 785–789, 976–978)
- Create: `app/tests/unit/core/archiverInlineRadio.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- archiverInlineRadio.test.ts && cd app && npm run test -- archiverInlineCheckbox.test.ts && cd app && npm run check` → all pass, 0 type errors.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/core/noteContentArchiver.ts", "app/tests/unit/core/archiverInlineRadio.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- archiverInlineRadio.test.ts && cd app && npm run test -- archiverInlineCheckbox.test.ts && cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["( ) parses to inlineRadio selected:false", "(o) and (O) parse to selected:true", "serialize emits ( ) and (o), closes marks first", "<bold>중요 ( ) 작업</bold> round-trips with bold split", "coexists with checkbox + footnote in same text", "title line unaffected", "getPlainText returns ( )/(o) for inlineRadio", "nextTextNodeMarks returns [] for inlineRadio", "no regression in checkbox archiver tests + npm run check passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Register extension + CSS in TomboyEditor.svelte
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Register `TomboyInlineRadio` in the editor's extension list and add CSS that mirrors `.tomboy-inline-checkbox` styling but with circular shape and centered dot for the selected state.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte` (line ~94 import; line ~527 extensions array; line ~2050 CSS section after checkbox styles)

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run check` → 0 errors. Then manual `cd app && npm run dev` smoke per plan Steps 5–6.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TomboyInlineRadio imported and spread into extensions array", "( ) 사과 (o) 배 renders two circles, second filled with dot", ".tomboy-inline-radio CSS exists: border-radius 50%, 24x24 ::before hit area, data-selected='true' ::after dot", "npm run check 0 errors", "manual smoke: select/toggle/persist + list-item isolation"]}
```
